title: EcoBag 20 Pack Blue Rubble Bags - 40L - 100 Microns - Recyclable Heavy Duty Bin Bags - Leak Resistant Rubble Sacks for Garden, Builders, Caterers, Kitchen, DIY (508 x 762mm)
features: Eco-Friendly Recycling Bags: Made from 100% recyclable materials, our EcoBag rubble sacks are perfect for eco-conscious consumers, helping to reduce plastic waste and promote sustainable practices.

Built for Heavy Loads: Designed for durability, these heavy-duty rubble bags are ideal for handling garden waste, rubble, and other tough jobs. They are crafted to withstand heavy loads without tearing or puncturing, ensuring reliable performance.

Extra Thick and Strong: With a 100 microns, our garden waste bags are engineered for maximum strength and resilience. They can manage even the sharpest and heaviest of materials, making them perfect for both household and commercial use.

Convenient Size and Capacity: Each rubble sack measures 508 x 762mm and has a generous 40-litre capacity. This makes them highly versatile for various applications, from garden waste to builders' debris, providing ample space for all your disposal needs.

Multipurpose Use: Whether you're using them as bin bags heavy duty, garden sacks, or builders' bags, our EcoBag rubble sacks offer versatility and convenience. Their robust construction ensures they are up to any task, from garden waste bags heavy duty to recycling bags for everyday use.
